case_title: CARTHEY, KENT R. VS OTTON,TERRY R. PARTNER/ ROBERTSON, STEPHENS & CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CARTHEY, KENT R. AS TO DEFENDANT OTTON,TERRY R. PARTNER/ ROBERTSON, STEPHENS & CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARTHEY, KENT R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OTTON,TERRY R. PARTNER/ ROBERTSON, STEPHENS & CO. $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $529.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OTTON,TERRY R. PARTNER/ ROBERTSON, STEPHENS & CO.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT OTTON,TERRY R. PARTNER/ ROBERTSON, STEPHENS & CO.
